response.step_by_step_log:

2. Extracted metadata from on-screen lower-thirds: Song 1 (Title: RENEGADE, Lyrics/Composition: Gimgigam/monii), Song 2 (Title: アワータイムイエロー, Lyrics/Composition: OHTORA/maeshima soshi).
3. Search queries: 
   - `"RENEGADE" Gimgigam Japanese and English lyrics`
   - `"アワータイムイエロー" OHTORA Japanese and English lyrics`
4. Parsed results for 'RENEGADE' to extract partial lyrics. Full lyrics for 'アワータイムイエロー' were not found in snippet results, set to null.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Hololive production characters, featuring 'RENEGADE' and 'アワータイムイエロー' with brief dialogue/intro segments.

scenes.description: Intro dialogue and positioning of characters on stage.
Characters perform 'RENEGADE' on stage. Title/credit text appears bottom-left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Tame the fire, and fall before my justice
Final warning, you know my rage is limitless
On the advent of a new genesis, I'm Infamous,
yeah, I get a little villainous.
Look into my eyes I'll seek you out
Reveal the truth and lies that you just can't hide
Clawing at the walls, I feel these sick temptations
